---
title: "Russell Goebel"
listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    max-items: 3
  - id: featured-project
    contents: projects/spatialBasis/index.qmd
    type: default
---

I'm a statistician with a background in consulting and academic research. 
I care about epistemology, rigor, and the gap between how statistics is 
taught and how it's actually practiced.

This site is where I think out loud — about statistical methods, data 
analysis, and occasionally other things.

:::  {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
## Recent Writing
::: {#recent-posts}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
## Featured Project
::: {#featured-project}
:::
:::

:::
